ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the major belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the major was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the major was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the major (e.g., STEM, Business, HASS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_data" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary data entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "starting_median_salary" INTEGER /* Starting median salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_median_salary" INTEGER /* Mid-career median salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_10th_percentile_salary" INTEGER /* Mid-career 10th percentile salary for the major */,
  "mid_career_90th_percentile_salary" INTEGER /* Mid-career 90th percentile salary for the major */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the salary data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the salary data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the salary data */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the salary data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user last logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of the data integration */,
  "data_points" TEXT /* Number of data points integrated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., salary distribution, comparative analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can view the major data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can edit the major data */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can delete the major data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "starting_median_salary" INTEGER /* Starting median salary for the major in that year */,
  "mid_career_median_salary" INTEGER /* Mid-career median salary for the major in that year */,
  "mid_career_10th_percentile_salary" INTEGER /* Mid-career 10th percentile salary for the major in that year */,
  "mid_career_90th_percentile_salary" INTEGER /* Mid-career 90th percentile salary for the major in that year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the historical data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the historical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the rule applies to */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column the rule applies to */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
